channel.title: SPL - Ballard Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Ballard Branch

item.title: Toddler Play Group
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

A drop-in play group for toddlers and their families.

Event details

item.title: Teen Arts & Crafts: Bath Bombs & Lip Balm
item.description:
Monday, March 9, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

Join us to make your own lip balm and bath bomb!

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Tuesday, March 10, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Bilingual Toddler Story Time / Hora de cuentos bilingüe para niños pequeños
item.description:
Wednesday, March 11, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room / Sala de reuniones

At Bilingual Toddler Story Time, kids ages 1-3 and their families can enjoy songs, stories, and music.Program in English and Spanish.--------------------------------------------Durante la hora de cuentos, los niños de 1 a 3 años y sus familias pueden disfrutar de canciones, cuentos y música.Evento en inglés y español.

Event details

item.title: Weekly Movie
item.description:
Wednesday, March 11, 2026 at 1:30 PM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for a movie and popcorn!

Event details

item.title: Minority Veterans of America
item.description:
Thursday, March 12, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Ballard Branch

Minority Veterans of America staff will be here to connect veterans to supportive services that are available throughout King County.

Event details

item.title: It's About Time Writers Reading Series
item.description:
Thursday, March 12, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Ballard Branch, Meeting Room

It's About Time Writers Reading Series features author readings and open mics.

Event details
